title: Production shard execution candidate contract

controls.title: Candidate phases are explicitly named
controls.nextAction: Use these phases as the only allowed v2080 failure-matrix scope.

controls.title: Execution invariants are explicitly named
controls.evidence: executionAllowed remains false until signed production approval exists; Node does not start or stop Java / mini-kv from this route; candidate phases are replayable from digests before any production window; write and migration operations stay outside the shard candidate contract
controls.nextAction: Verify each invariant in v2080 and v2081.

controls.title: Signed production execution approval
controls.evidence: No signed production execution approval artifact is present in this candidate batch.
controls.nextAction: Capture a signed approval artifact before any production execution window can open.

controls.title: Managed audit production store binding
controls.evidence: The candidate remains archive-backed and does not connect to managed audit production storage.
controls.nextAction: Bind immutable production execution records to a managed audit store before real execution.

controls.title: Rollback and abort owner confirmation
controls.evidence: Abort and rollback semantics are documented as a candidate matrix, not signed by all service owners.
controls.nextAction: Have Node, Java, and mini-kv owners sign the abort and rollback responsibilities.

invariants: executionAllowed remains false until signed production approval exists
Node does not start or stop Java / mini-kv from this route
candidate phases are replayable from digests before any production window
write and migration operations stay outside the shard candidate contract
candidateContract.allowedRuntimeSurface: read-only probe evidence and archive replay only
candidateContract.forbiddenRuntimeSurface: write commands, migrations, credential reads, raw endpoint parsing, active shard routing

stagePayload.growthStopCondition: Do not add another candidate contract unless a later Java or mini-kv artifact changes the execution surface.

productionBlockers.message: Signed production execution approval is still pending. Capture a signed approval artifact before any production execution window can open.
Managed audit production store binding is still pending. Bind immutable production execution records to a managed audit store before real execution.
Rollback and abort owner confirmation is still pending. Have Node, Java, and mini-kv owners sign the abort and rollback responsibilities.

warnings.message: The candidate contract names the execution shape but still denies production execution.

recommendations.message: Derive v2080 failure, abort, and rollback semantics directly from the five candidate phases.

nextActions: Use v2079 as the contract boundary for v2080 failure, abort, and rollback classification.
Keep the contract disabled-by-default; production blockers remain intentional until signed approval exists.
Ask Java and mini-kv only for evidence that maps to these phases, not broad new reports.
